description_long: This is an ornate ceiling-mounted chandelier with six evenly spaced arms radiating from a central glass or crystal body. Each arm supports a light fixture covered by a semi-transparent, grayish lampshade, giving the piece a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The central stem is adorned with decorative glass or crystal elements, and the arms are gently curved, adding elegance to the overall design. The chandelier is suspended from the ceiling by a chain and a round ceiling plate, both finished in a matching light color. The lampshades appear to be made of a fine mesh or fabric, allowing diffused light to pass through. The overall style is a blend of modern and classic, suitable for upscale urban interiors.
description: A six-arm ceiling chandelier with gray mesh lampshades, glass/crystal accents, and a decorative central stem, suspended by a chain.
description_view_0: Front view showing three lampshades clearly, with the central stem and chain visible.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the arrangement of all six lampshades and the symmetry of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with three lampshades in focus and the central body visible.
description_view_3: Angled view similar to view 1, highlighting the circular arrangement of the lampshades and the decorative stem.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a transitional design blending modern simplicity with classic elegance, highlighted by curved arms, glass accents, and mesh lampshades.
